rules_applied.batch_5_7_day_rule: LinkedIn for every Batch 5 lead MUST be executed within 7 days of initial send. Day 3 = Friday 2026-05-15. Hard deadline = Tuesday 2026-05-19. Archive immediately if missed. No deferrals.

coordination_rules: IMAP sweep each Batch 5 lead before LinkedIn connection note send
No LinkedIn on weekends (Saturday 2026-05-17 is blocked)
No LinkedIn on bank holidays — check UK calendar before Friday execution
Day-3: email bump first, LinkedIn second (1+ hour gap)
Max 2 touchpoints per lead per week across all channels
Do not reference the email sequence, SSL, mobile, or any technical audit finding in the LinkedIn note
